articles.title: Charter Reports Broadband Subscriber Losses
articles.summary: Charter Communications reported a decline in broadband subscribers for the quarter, citing intensifying competition from fixed wireless providers.

articles.title: Charter Lowers Full-Year Subscriber Guidance
articles.summary: Charter cut its full-year subscriber growth outlook, pointing to a more competitive residential broadband market than previously expected.

articles.title: Charter Announces Merger Talks With Cox Communications
articles.summary: Charter confirmed it was in discussions regarding a potential merger with Cox Communications, a move that would reshape the cable industry landscape.

articles.title: Charter Faces Investigation Over Billing Practices
articles.summary: State regulators opened an inquiry into Charter's Spectrum billing practices following a rise in customer complaints.

articles.title: Charter Launches New Spectrum Mobile Bundle
articles.summary: Charter unveiled a new bundled mobile and broadband plan under its Spectrum brand, aiming to slow subscriber losses to competitors.

articles.title: Analyst Downgrades Charter on Competitive Pressure
articles.summary: An analyst downgraded Charter shares, citing sustained competitive pressure from fiber and fixed wireless broadband alternatives.

articles.title: Charter Declares Quarterly Dividend
articles.summary: Charter's board declared its regular quarterly dividend, payable to shareholders of record next month.
